heading: Determination of trade-in allowance
label: 57305 Determination of trade-in allowance

children.text: the scrap value of the obsolete vessel in American and foreign markets;
the depreciated value based on a 20-year or 25-year life, whichever applies to the obsolete vessel; and
the market value of the obsolete vessel for operation in world commerce or in the domestic or foreign commerce of the United States.

children.heading: .—Use of Obsolete Vessels
children.label: b .—Use of Obsolete Vessels
children.text: If acquisition of the obsolete vessel occurs when the owner contracts for the construction of the new vessel, and the owner uses the obsolete vessel during the period of construction of the new vessel, the Secretary shall reduce the trade-in allowance by an amount representing the fair value of that use. The Secretary shall establish the rate for use of the obsolete vessel when the contract for construction of the new vessel is made.
